mnemonics: HOT BUTTONS: Histograms, Outliers, Trends, Boxplots, Univariate, Two-way, Scatterplots
keyPoints: Interactive features allow users to dynamically filter, zoom, and hover for data details.
They facilitate the exploration of relationships and patterns that static plots might hide.
Tools like linked brushing enable the simultaneous exploration of multiple variables across different plots.
commonMistakes: Overloading a dashboard with too many interactive elements, causing confusion rather than insight.
Using interactivity as a substitute for clear, well-designed static visualizations.
